title: platycarpha glomerata
intro: Platycarpha glomerata, also known as the Buttonweed or Button Daisy, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Platycarpha glomerata include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and poultices, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
